current_p5_dataflow.local_lane: d owns PV dimension plus l/m state columns
current_p5_dataflow.token_loop: j serial inside each d lane
current_p5_dataflow.m_l_state: inside tile, but redundantly computed per d lane

target_matrix.required_site: lane-sharded partial max for the same (h,s) split
target_matrix.current_site: serial j loop computes full m redundantly per d lane inside flash_online_state_pv_tile_whole_cache_32_128
target_matrix.decision: needs token/dot sharding before cross-lane max is meaningful

target_matrix.required_site: lane-sharded partial denominator for the same (h,s) split
target_matrix.current_site: serial j loop computes full l redundantly per d lane; only d==Hd is stored
target_matrix.decision: needs token sharding before cross-lane add is meaningful

target_matrix.required_site: multiple lanes contribute partial PV to the same output D
target_matrix.current_site: each local d lane owns one output D and performs the full token loop alone
target_matrix.decision: needs a second lane dimension or token-sharded D ownership before cross-lane PV combine exists

target_matrix.required_site: q.k score production inside or directly fused with online-state tile
target_matrix.decision: needs score/tile fusion or token/dot-sharded score path before packed dot can close the primitive

decision.why: P5 moved m/l state into the tile, but every local lane still performs the full serial token loop. Cross-lane lowerings need lane-sharded partials; packed-dot needs score production inside/directly fused with the tile.
do_not_do_next: global WARP_REDUCE_LOWERING without a lane-sharded site
standalone score fdot2 rerun as the main path
